task_completion.description: The sales data is imported and a Calendar table is created with Year, Quarter, and MonthNum columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Data/Fields pane on the right, there should be two tables visible: 'sales_performance_2yr' (or similar name from the CSV import) and 'Calendar'. Expanding the Calendar table should show fields including 'Date', 'Year', 'Quarter', and 'MonthNum'.

task_completion.description: Three DAX measures are created: Total_Revenue, PY_Revenue, and YoY_Growth.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Data/Fields pane, there should be fields named 'Total_Revenue', 'PY_Revenue', and 'YoY_Growth' with calculator icons indicating they are measures (not columns).

task_completion.description: The report page is renamed to 'YoY Analysis'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The page tab at the bottom of the Power BI canvas should read 'YoY Analysis'.

task_completion.description: A Clustered Column Chart shows Total_Revenue by Region with Year as the legend, displaying grouped bars for 2023 and 2024 per region.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A column chart on the canvas with Region labels (East, West, North, South) on the X-axis and two differently-colored bars per region representing 2023 and 2024. A legend should show the two years. The bars should show varying heights across regions.

task_completion.description: A Line Chart shows Total_Revenue by month with Year as the legend, displaying two overlaid trend lines for 2023 and 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A line chart on the canvas with months (1-12 or month names) on the X-axis and two differently-colored lines, one for each year. The legend should show 2023 and 2024.

task_completion.description: A Matrix visual shows YoY_Growth by Region (rows) and Product_Category (columns) with red/green conditional formatting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Matrix visual on the canvas with Region names as row headers (East, West, North, South) and Product_Category as column headers (Electronics, Clothing, Food, Furniture). The cell values should show percentages. Cells must have colored backgrounds: red/warm tones for negative values (North region should show decline) and green/cool tones for positive values (West and South should show growth).

task_completion.description: A Card visual displays the overall YoY_Growth as a percentage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Card visual on the canvas displaying a single percentage value for YoY_Growth. The value should be a positive percentage (the dataset has overall net growth).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Power BI Desktop GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Power BI Desktop application open with menus, panes, and dialogs being actively used, rather than just a terminal or script editor.

integrity.description: The visuals on the report canvas are genuinely rendered by Power BI from real data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Column Chart, Line Chart, Matrix, and Card should appear as native Power BI visuals with standard formatting, selection handles when active, and data-driven content (not pasted images or static text).

integrity.description: The file is saved with the correct name.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Power BI window title bar at the top should read 'YoY_Performance - Power BI Desktop', or the file 'YoY_Performance.pbix' should be visible on the Desktop.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains approximately 4000 rows of sales transactions spanning 2023-01-01 to 2024-12-31 across 4 regions (East, West, North, South) and 4 product categories (Electronics, Clothing, Food, Furniture). 2024 data has built-in YoY growth: West +15%, South +20%, North -10%, East +2%. The Calendar table should be a separate calculated table with Date, Year, Quarter, and MonthNum columns. The Matrix conditional formatting should show red cells for North (negative growth) and green cells for West/South (positive growth). East should be near-zero/slightly green. The overall YoY_Growth card should show a small positive percentage.
